title: Shape
description: Immutable local-space collision geometry. A `Shape` carries no transform — a Collider positions it in a body. Shapes also expose the area-based mass properties (`area`, `centroid`, `unitInertia`) the body uses to derive mass and rotational inertia from a density; these are computed once at construction and frozen. `unitInertia` is the second moment of area about the shape's own centroid (∫ r² dA). Multiplying by density yields the rotational inertia contribution of the shape about its centroid.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Immutable local-space collision geometry. A `Shape` carries no transform — a Collider positions it in a body. Shapes also expose the area-based mass properties (`area`, `centroid`, `unitInertia`) the body uses to derive mass and rotational inertia from a density; these are computed once at construction and frozen.
`unitInertia` is the second moment of area about the shape's own centroid (∫ r² dA). Multiplying by density yields the rotational inertia contribution of the shape about its centroid.

members.name: area
members.description: Surface area in px². mass = density × area.

members.name: boundingRadius
members.description: Radius of the smallest circle about the local origin enclosing the shape.

members.name: centroidX
members.description: X of the area centroid in local space.

members.name: centroidY
members.description: Y of the area centroid in local space.

members.name: unitInertia
members.description: Second moment of area (∫ r² dA) about the centroid; inertia = density × unitInertia.
